creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
building biology/platon fails with memory exhaustion.
	This happens only on amd64. on i386 no error occurs.
	And, this problem did not appear before updating Xorg to 7.2,
	always happens then.

Fix: 

I do not know.
	No optimization flags to gfrotran42 can avoid this.
How-To-Repeat: 	Always when
	% cd /usr/ports/biology/platon
	% make
